chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Crl. Misc. Appln. No.S- 314 of 2025 DATE OF HEARING ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE Hearing of case 1. For orders on office objections at flag ‘A’ 2. For hearing of main case 3. For hearing of MA No.2703/2025 (S/A) 14.07.2025 Mr. Munawar Ali Shaikh, Advocate for the Applicant Mr. Khalil Ahmed Maitlo, Deputy Prosecutor General **************** Learned Counsel for the applicant submits that he no longer wishes to press this Criminal Miscellaneous Application. Accordingly, the same is dismissed as not pressed along with listed application. Judge ARBROHI/PS
